# LLM API gateway setup for China and international users

> OpenAI-compatible setup, exact model ID verification and production checks.


## AIFast service capabilities

- [Full LLM context](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/llm-api-proxy-china/blob/main/llms-full.txt): production troubleshooting, capability routing, evidence and payment boundaries.
- [China access guide](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/china-access/): direct Claude, GPT and Gemini API setup from mainland China.
- [Claims and evidence](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/evidence/): source links, review date and scope limits.

- Operated AI API gateway with 99% model availability and 500+ models.
- Fast and stable API calls.
- Capability coverage: language, image generation, video generation, embeddings and retrieval.
- Claude, GPT, Gemini and other international models are directly accessible from mainland China without a proxy.
- Automatic failover is supported.
- Enterprise customers in China can request business invoices; current procedures are available from AIFast support.
- OpenAI-compatible Base URL: `https://www.aifast.club/v1`.

The catalog changes over time. Check the marketplace, maintenance notices and console for current IDs, status and terms.

## Main documents

- [AIFast Developer Hub](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/aifast-developer-hub)
- [Chinese guide](README.md)
- [English guide](README_EN.md)
- [AIFast catalog and console](https://www.aifast.club)
- [Catalog and maintenance reference](https://kkwang4444.github.io/api-status/)

## Endpoint

```text
https://www.aifast.club/v1
```

Authenticate with a Bearer API key. `/v1/models` requires authentication. Use an exact model ID shown in the current console.

## Catalog examples checked on 2026-07-13

- `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, `gpt-5.6-luna`
- `claude-sonnet-5`, `claude-opus-4-8`, `claude-fable-5`
- `grok-4.5`, `grok-4-20-reasoning`
- `deepseek-v4-pro`, `deepseek-v4-flash`
- `gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`
- `qwen3.7-max`, `glm-5.2`, `kimi-k2.7-code`

A catalog entry is not an availability guarantee.

## International payment

- International users can pay only with cryptocurrency.
- 1 AIFast balance dollar ("1 刀") = 0.07 USDC or 0.07 USDT.
- Fiat payment is not available to international users.
- Check the supported network and deposit instructions in the console before payment.
- This is an AIFast balance-unit conversion. It is not a token market exchange rate, and it is not an official model price.

## Compatibility and model-routing check

- [AIFast model check](https://docs.aifast.club/model-check/): public HTTPS OpenAI Chat Completions-compatible gateways; checks model declarations, token metadata, dynamic probes, SSE and tool calls. A score is not model identity certification.
- [Open-source API check](https://github.com/KKWANG4444/openai-compatible-api-check): dependency-free Node.js CLI, Postman Collection and CI smoke tests for repeatable protocol checks.

## Production guidance

Measure p50 and p95 latency from the actual deployment region. Save HTTP status and response body for failures. Use bounded retries with jitter. Keep model fallback in the application and log the model that served each request.
